name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international operator of pawn stores with a significant retail footprint. Founded and established as a public company (trading on major indices including the S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000), FirstCash has grown to operate more than 3,300 retail pawn and consumer lending locations across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and throughout Latin America including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The company employs approximately 22,000 people across these markets.

FirstCash's primary business focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through several core offerings. Their pawn stores buy and sell a diverse inventory including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. They provide non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, allowing customers to borrow against items they own. Additional services include gold and precious metal buying, layaway plans with 10% down payments, and retail sales of merchandise. Through their wholly-owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash also provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions across a network of over 15,000 active retail merchant partner locations.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its international scale and operational reach—it operates the largest network of pawn locations globally with significant presence across multiple continents. The company positions itself as technology-driven and professionally managed, as evidenced by its public company status and inclusion in major market indices. Their diversified revenue streams beyond traditional pawn loans (gold buying, layaway, retail sales, and the AFF payment solutions subsidiary) create multiple touchpoints with consumers seeking quick cash access or affordable payment options.

FirstCash is well-suited for consumers needing immediate cash without credit checks, as pawn loans require only collateral. However, customers should understand that pawn loans are non-recourse debt—failure to repay means losing the pledged item. The company's broad geographic footprint makes it accessible to many Americans, but loan terms, interest rates, and merchandise selection will vary by location. As a for-profit public company primarily serving credit-constrained populations, FirstCash represents a mainstream but still specialized financial services provider.
pros: Massive geographic footprint with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America—highest accessibility among pawn operators
No credit check required for pawn loans; based purely on collateral value of pledged items
Immediate cash on the spot for gold, jewelry, and other merchandise sales without application delays
Diverse inventory and services including electronics, tools, jewelry, layaway plans (10% down), and specialized gold buying
Public company with professional management, indexed on S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000, suggesting regulatory oversight and financial stability
Non-recourse loan structure means borrowers are not liable for loan deficiency if item sells for less than owed amount
Convenient layaway service with low 10% down payment for customers wanting to purchase without financing
cons: Pawn loans typically carry high interest rates (not disclosed on website but standard industry range is 10-20% monthly), making them expensive relative to traditional loans
Pledged items are forfeited if loan is not repaid by maturity date—customer loses the collateral permanently
Limited transparency on website regarding specific loan terms, interest rates, loan duration, and redemption processes
Merchandise inventory and loan amounts will vary significantly by individual store location; no guaranteed availability
Serves primarily cash-constrained consumers, which may indicate loans are structured to be accessible to those with poor credit or no banking alternatives
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) without credit checks or income verification for emergency expenses
Individuals with items of value (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to temporarily forfeit as collateral
Sellers of gold, jewelry, or merchandise looking for quick cash payment on the spot without dealer negotiations
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking discounted used merchandise or unique inventory finds in retail locations
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who own valuable items they're willing to pledge as collateral, as pawn loans require no credit checks and provide same-day funding. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term debt with high interest rates, and borrowers will permanently lose their pledged items if unable to repay—making this suitable only for temporary financial shortfalls, not ongoing credit needs.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, etc.)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Retail sales of new and used merchandise (jewelry, electronics, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment option
Item redemption and loan renewal services at pawn store locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary at 15,000+ merchant partner locations
Store locator and inventory search tools via website
Multiple retail location access across international markets for customer convenience
